name: Quick Ham Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Using five Crescent rolls, line the bottom and sides of a glass pie pan. Press and stretch the dough to fill gaps.
3. Fill the lined pie pan with cubed Monterey jack cheese and cooked roast beef.
4. Beat together eggs and Parmesan cheese. Pour over the ham and cheese cubes.
5. Using the remaining three Crescent rolls, make four strips. Arrange the strips in a lattice work over the filled pie pan, tucking the ends under to seal.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes or until the center is set.
Preparation Time: 60 minutes
Note: Left-over cooked ham, crumbled bacon, fresh mushrooms, or other vegetables can be substituted for the roast beef.
